semantic.role: TypeScript module defining the repair policy decision logic for violation handling in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Defines the RepairPolicyAction union type for possible repair strategies (targeted-repair, prompt-full-rebuild, require-full-rebuild).
Defines the RepairPolicyDecision interface encapsulating the decision outcome with violation metrics and targeted files.
Implements logic to classify violation paths and determine appropriate repair actions based on path mapping.
Processes changed, added, and removed paths from violation reports to build targeted repair sets.
outOfScope: Direct file system I/O or network operations.
Low-level infrastructure orchestration or service management.
invariants: Exports only type definitions and pure decision logic.
Relies on imported violation report types for input structure.
Operates on path strings to produce repair decisions without side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Encapsulate repair strategy selection as a configurable policy to enable targeted sync repairs and reduce full rebuild overhead.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Addition of repair policy and experimental view layer as part of sync system enhancements.

English.role: TypeScript module defining the repair policy decision logic for violation handling in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Defines the RepairPolicyAction union type for possible repair strategies such as targeted-repair, prompt-full-rebuild, and require-full-rebuild.
Defines the RepairPolicyDecision interface that encapsulates the decision outcome, including violation counts and targeted file lists.
Implements logic to classify violation paths and determine appropriate repair actions based on path mapping.
Processes changed, added, and removed paths from violation reports to build targeted repair sets.
outOfScope: Direct file system I/O or network operations.
Low-level infrastructure orchestration or service management.
